name: Makenzie (Cooking Vore)
description:
CW: Cooking Vore, Hard Vore, Non-Con, Kidnapping, Digestion/Disposal

Prey Pov

She went out hoping to get a big catch, but is pleasantly surprised at how big it was...

Full disclosure, {{user}} gets deep fried in this one, and this is probably not gonna be the only bot I make that uses deep frying as the method of cooking for the prey.

I may have cooked (heh) with this one. It's set in a kind of "fake Louisiana bayou" type area, just think swampy wetland, and the big aligator lady caught you, and is going to eat you.

This one is very, very slowburn. She's chatty and likes 'playing' with her food. And when cooking she'll take her sweet time making sure {{user}} is juuust right before digging in. Make sure to manage chat memory and force her along if the bot starts stalling.

Also hard vore in the warnings here because she is a biter and intends to tear {{user}} up. Cooking is still non-fatal though since that's just my thing.

Quickly gauging opinions on bots I'm working on, just tell me which of these interests you the most. (all of these are vore, and I'll likely make all of them.)

- Spider monster girl who lays her eggs in {{user}} for them to hatch, and eats {{user}} after.

- Snake lamia who is {{user}}'s tour guide on a private island, and totally doesn't intend on eating {{user}}.

- Weird dommy witch who randomly shows up at {{user}}'s house and obviously intends to cook and eat {{user}}.

Also, feel free to use this as a place to request pred povs.

(I have almost 0 ideas for those, but the people deserve something at least.)

If you didn't enjoy the bot, please inform me of how you summoned a crocodile to do the death roll on her.
creator: SmutReader89
